content.problemStatement:
There is a grid of size 105×10510^5 \times 10^5105×105, covered completely in railway tracks. Tom is riding in a train, currently in cell (a,b)(a, b)(a,b), and Jerry is tied up in a different cell (c,d)(c, d)(c,d), unable to move. The train has no brakes. It shall move exactly KKK steps, and then its fuel will run out and it shall stop. In one step, the train must move to one of its neighboring cells, sharing a side. Tom can’t move without the train, as the grid is covered in tracks. Can Tom reach Jerry’s cell after exactly KKK steps?

**Note:** Tom can go back to the same cell multiple times.


Input Format

The first line contains an integer TTT, the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
Each test case contains a single line of input, five integers a,b,c,d,Ka, b, c, d, Ka,b,c,d,K.


Output Format
For each testcase, output in a single line "YES" if Tom can reach Jerry's cell in exactly KKK moves and "NO" if not.


You may print each character of the string in uppercase or lowercase (for example, the strings "yEs", "yes", "Yes" and "YES" will all be treated as identical).
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains five integers a, b, c, d, K separated by spaces.
content.outputFormat: For each test case output a single line containing "YES" if Tom can reach Jerry's cell in exactly K moves, otherwise output "NO".

sampleTestCases.explanation: Test case 1: Manhattan distance = 2, K = 2, parity matches → YES.\nTest case 2: Distance = 3, K = 4, (4-3) is odd → NO.\nTest case 3: Distance = 2, K = 3, (3-2) is odd? Wait distance = |1-1|+|1-0|=1, actually distance = 1, K=3, (3-1)=2 even → YES.

solution.approach: For each test case compute the Manhattan distance D = |a - c| + |b - d|. Tom can reach the target in exactly K steps iff K >= D and (K - D) is even. The extra even number of steps can be spent moving back and forth without changing the final position.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) – each test case is processed in constant time.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few variables are used per test case.

code.Python3:
import sys

def solve():
    data = sys.stdin.read().strip().split()
    if not data:
        return
    it = iter(data)
    T = int(next(it))
    out = []
    for _ in range(T):
        a = int(next(it)); b = int(next(it)); c = int(next(it)); d = int(next(it)); K = int(next(it))
        D = abs(a - c) + abs(b - d)
        out.append('YES' if K >= D and (K - D) % 2 == 0 else 'NO')
    sys.stdout.write('\n'.join(out))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()
